inputs.question: Show the stadium name and the number of concerts in each stadium.

joins: stadium INNER JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID

sql:
SELECT stadium.Name, COUNT(concert.concert_ID) 
FROM stadium 
INNER JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID

inputs.question: For each stadium, how many concerts play there?

joins: stadium INNER JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID

sql:

FROM stadium
INNER JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY stadium.Stadium_ID, stadium.Name

inputs.question: Show the stadium name and capacity with most number of concerts in year 2014 or after.

FROM stadium
JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID
WHERE concert.Year >= '2014'
GROUP BY stadium.Stadium_ID, stadium.Name, stadium.Capacity
ORDER BY COUNT(concert.concert_ID) DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Find the name and location of the stadiums which some concerts happened in the years of both 2014 and 2015.

joins: stadium INNER JOIN concert ON stadium.Stadium_ID = concert.Stadium_ID

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name, s.Location
FROM stadium s
INNER JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year = '2014'

    FROM concert c2
    WHERE c2.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID
    AND c2.Year = '2015'
)

inputs.question: What is the semester which most student registered in? Show both the name and the id.

joins: Student_Enrolment JOIN Semesters ON Student_Enrolment.semester_id = Semesters.semester_id

FROM Student_Enrolment
JOIN Semesters ON Student_Enrolment.semester_id = Semesters.semester_id

ORDER BY COUNT(Student_Enrolment.student_id) DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: For each semester, what is the name and id of the one with the most students registered?

aggregations: COUNT(Student_Enrolment.student_id) AS student_count GROUP BY Semesters.semester_id, Semesters.semester_name

sql:
SELECT 
    Semesters.semester_name, 
    Students.student_id, 
    Students.first_name, 
    Students.last_name
FROM 
    Semesters
JOIN 
    Student_Enrolment ON Student_Enrolment.semester_id = Semesters.semester_id
JOIN 
    Students ON Student_Enrolment.student_id = Students.student_id
GROUP BY 
    Semesters.semester_id, 
    Semesters.semester_name, 
    Students.student_id, 
    Students.first_name, 
    Students.last_name
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(Student_Enrolment.student_id) DESC
LIMIT 1

inputs.question: Find the semester when both Master students and Bachelor students got enrolled in.

joins: Students JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Students.student_id = Student_Enrolment.student_id
Student_Enrolment JOIN Degree_Programs ON Student_Enrolment.degree_program_id = Degree_Programs.degree_program_id
Student_Enrolment JOIN Semesters ON Student_Enrolment.semester_id = Semesters.semester_id

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.semester_name
FROM Students st
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON st.student_id = se.student_id
JOIN Degree_Programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
JOIN Semesters s ON se.semester_id = s.semester_id
WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Master'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT s.semester_name
FROM Students st
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON st.student_id = se.student_id
JOIN Degree_Programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
JOIN Semesters s ON se.semester_id = s.semester_id
WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelor'

inputs.question: What is the id of the semester that had both Masters and Bachelors students enrolled?

joins: Semesters JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Semesters.semester_id = Student_Enrolment.semester_id
Student_Enrolment JOIN Degree_Programs ON Student_Enrolment.degree_program_id = Degree_Programs.degree_program_id

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.semester_id
FROM Semesters s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.semester_id = se.semester_id
JOIN Degree_Programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Masters'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT s.semester_id
FROM Semesters s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.semester_id = se.semester_id
JOIN Degree_Programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelors'
